project: Communication Protocol Effects on Multi-Agent System Efficiency
course: GR5293 Generative AI using Large Language Models

evaluation.reading: SQuAD token-level F1 vs gold answers (continuous 0-1)
evaluation.news: Mean of ROUGE-2 F1 and ROUGE-L F1 vs key-facts reference (continuous 0-1)

methodology_notes.shared_memory: Every agent is injected the full JSON snapshot of the blackboard; overhead scales with state size.
methodology_notes.nl_protocol: Explicit plain-English-prose instruction to prevent default-to-markdown drift.
methodology_notes.reproducibility: OpenAI seed parameter matches rep index; random / numpy seeded for sampling.
